_comment: Claude Desktop configuration for JP Bids MCP + J-Grants MCP integration.
_comment_jgrants: J-Grants MCP must be running locally first: cd jgrants-mcp-server && python -m jgrants_mcp_server.core
_comment_jpbids: JP Bids MCP is hosted remotely. mcp-remote bridges Streamable HTTP to stdio.

jp-bids._comment: Remote JP Bids MCP. During beta (until June 2026) no API key required.

jgrants._comment: Local J-Grants MCP (digital-go-jp/jgrants-mcp-server). Start it before launching Claude Desktop.
